info.name: GUPJOB - Lazy Architecture Test
info.description: Updated collection for Auth, Admin, and User Service (Lazy Nodes + Cache).

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Ngoc Khanh",
  "email": "lehoang2@example.com",
  "password": "ngockhanh",
  "role": "MENTOR",
  "bio": "Senior Backend Developer passionate about teaching scalable architecture.",
  "cvUrl": "https://example.com/jane-doe-cv.pdf",
  "linkedinUrl": "https://linkedin.com/in/janedoe123",
  "industry": "Software Engineering",
  "skills": ["NestJS", "Node.js", "PostgreSQL", "Docker"]
}

{
    "title": "Backend Mastery",
    "slug": "backend-mastery",
    "type": "JOB",
    "departmentId": 1,
    "description": "Master server-side engineering, database management, API design, and DevOps principles to become a professional Backend Developer."
}

{
  "title": "Frontend Developer Path",
  "slug": "frontend-mastery",
  "description": "A comprehensive path to becoming a Frontend Developer, covering HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, and Modern Tooling.",
  "nodes": [
    {
      "nodeKey": "internet",
      "title": "Internet Basics",
      "coords": { "x": 0, "y": 0 },
      "isRequired": false,
      "summary": "Understand the foundational concepts of the web: how DNS works, what a Domain Name is, HTTP vs HTTPS, and how Browsers render pages.",
      "contentMd": "### 💚 Free Resources\n---\n\n⚫ **Roadmap** [How the Internet Works](https://roadmap.sh/guides/how-internet-works)\n🟡 **Article** [MDN - How the Web Works](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Learn/Common_questions/Web_mechanics/How_does_the_Internet_work)\n🟣 **Video** [How the Internet Works in 5 Minutes](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7_LPdttKXPc)"
    },
    {
      "nodeKey": "html",
      "title": "HTML",
      "coords": { "x": 350, "y": 0 },
      "isRequired": true,
      "summary": "The standard markup language for documents designed to be displayed in a web browser. It defines the structure and meaning of web content.",
      "contentMd": "### 💚 Free Resources\n---\n\n⚫ **Roadmap** [Visit Dedicated HTML Roadmap](https://roadmap.sh/html)\n🟡 **Article** [MDN - HTML Basics](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Learn/Getting_started_with_the_web/HTML_basics)\n🟡 **Article** [W3Schools - HTML Tutorial](https://www.w3schools.com/html/)\n🟣 **Video** [HTML Crash Course For Absolute Beginners](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UB1O30fR-EE)\n\n### 💜 Premium Resources\n---\n\n🟢 **Course** [Codecademy - Learn HTML](https://www.codecademy.com/learn/learn-html)"
    },
    {
      "nodeKey": "css",
      "title": "CSS",
      "coords": { "x": 700, "y": 0 },
      "isRequired": true,
      "summary": "Style sheet language used for describing the presentation of a document written in HTML. It controls layout, colors, fonts, and responsiveness.",
      "contentMd": "### 💚 Free Resources\n---\n\n⚫ **Roadmap** [Visit Dedicated CSS Roadmap](https://roadmap.sh/css)\n🟡 **Article** [web.dev - Learn CSS](https://web.dev/learn/css/)\n🟡 **Article** [CSS-Tricks - A Complete Guide to Flexbox](https://css-tricks.com/snippets/css/a-guide-to-flexbox/)\n🟣 **Video** [CSS Crash Course for Beginners](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yfoY53QXEnI)\n\n### 💜 Premium Resources\n---\n\n🟢 **Course** [Scrimba - Learn CSS](https://scrimba.com/learn/css)"
    },
    {
      "nodeKey": "js",
      "title": "JavaScript",
      "coords": { "x": 1050, "y": 0 },
      "isRequired": true,
      "summary": "Programming language that enables interactive web pages. It is an essential part of web applications, allowing for dynamic content, control of multimedia, and animation.",
      "contentMd": "### 💚 Free Resources\n---\n\n⚫ **Roadmap** [Visit Dedicated JavaScript Roadmap](https://roadmap.sh/javascript)\n🟡 **Article** [The Modern JavaScript Tutorial](https://javascript.info)\n🟡 **Article** [Namaste JavaScript (Deep Dive)](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLlasXeu85E9cQ32gLCvAvr9vNaUccPVNP)\n🟣 **Video** [JavaScript Crash Course for Beginners](https://youtube.com)\n\n### 💜 Premium Resources\n---\n\n🟢 **Course** [Scrimba - Fullstack Developer Path](https://scrimba.com)"
    },
    {
      "nodeKey": "git",
      "title": "Version Control (Git)",
      "coords": { "x": 1050, "y": 250 },
      "isRequired": true,
      "summary": "Track changes in your code, collaborate with others, and manage your projects with GitHub. Essential for any team workflow.",
      "contentMd": "### 💚 Free Resources\n---\n\n🟡 **Book** [Pro Git (Free Book)](https://git-scm.com/book/en/v2)\n🟡 **Interactive** [Learn Git Branching (Game)](https://learngitbranching.js.org/)\n🟣 **Video** [Git and GitHub for Beginners - Crash Course](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RGOj5yH7evk)"
    },
    {
      "nodeKey": "npm",
      "title": "Package Managers",
      "coords": { "x": 700, "y": 250 },
      "isRequired": true,
      "summary": "Tools like npm or yarn to automate installing, upgrading, and configuring software libraries and dependencies.",
      "contentMd": "### 💚 Free Resources\n---\n\n🟡 **Article** [NPM Docs - About npm](https://docs.npmjs.com/about-npm)\n🟡 **Article** [FreeCodeCamp - What is NPM?](https://www.freecodecamp.org/news/what-is-npm-a-node-package-manager-tutorial-for-beginners/)\n🟣 **Video** [NPM Crash Course](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jHDhaSSKmB0)"
    },
    {
      "nodeKey": "react",
      "title": "React",
      "coords": { "x": 350, "y": 250 },
      "isRequired": true,
      "summary": "A JavaScript library for building user interfaces. The most popular frontend framework, focusing on component-based architecture.",
      "contentMd": "### 💚 Free Resources\n---\n\n⚫ **Roadmap** [React Roadmap](https://roadmap.sh/react)\n🟡 **Article** [React Official Documentation](https://react.dev/learn)\n🟡 **Interactive** [Scrimba - Learn React for Free](https://scrimba.com/learn/learnreact)\n🟣 **Video** [React JS - Full Course for Beginners](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bMknfKXIFA8)\n\n### 💜 Premium Resources\n---\n\n🟢 **Course** [EpicReact.dev by Kent C. Dodds](https://epicreact.dev/)"
    },
    {
      "nodeKey": "tailwind",
      "title": "Tailwind CSS",
      "coords": { "x": 0, "y": 250 },
      "isRequired": true,
      "summary": "A utility-first CSS framework for rapidly building custom designs without leaving your HTML. It speeds up styling significantly.",
      "contentMd": "### 💚 Free Resources\n---\n\n🟡 **Documentation** [Tailwind CSS Docs](https://tailwindcss.com/docs/utility-first)\n🟣 **Video** [Tailwind CSS Crash Course](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ft30zcMlFao)\n\n### 💜 Premium Resources\n---\n\n🟢 **UI Kit** [Tailwind UI (Official Components)](https://tailwindui.com/)"
    },
    {
      "nodeKey": "build_tools",
      "title": "Build Tools (Vite)",
      "coords": { "x": 0, "y": 500 },
      "isRequired": false,
      "summary": "Tools that bundle your assets and code for production. Vite is the modern standard for blazing fast development servers.",
      "contentMd": "### 💚 Free Resources\n---\n\n🟡 **Article** [Why Vite?](https://vitejs.dev/guide/why.html)\n🟡 **Article** [Vite for Beginners](https://www.freecodecamp.org/news/get-started-with-vite/)\n🟣 **Video** [Vite Crash Course](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VAeRhSVqXWQ)"
    },
    {
      "nodeKey": "api",
      "title": "APIs & Fetch",
      "coords": { "x": 350, "y": 500 },
      "isRequired": true,
      "summary": "Learn how to fetch data from a server using the Fetch API and Axios, and understand how REST APIs work.",
      "contentMd": "### 💚 Free Resources\n---\n\n🟡 **Article** [MDN - Using the Fetch API](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Fetch_API/Using_Fetch)\n🟡 **Article** [Axios vs Fetch](https://www.geeksforgeeks.org/difference-between-fetch-and-axios-js-for-making-http-requests/)\n🟣 **Video** [Fetch API - Intro to making network requests](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cuEtnrL9-KE)"
    },
    {
      "nodeKey": "state",
      "title": "State Management",
      "coords": { "x": 700, "y": 500 },
      "isRequired": false,
      "summary": "Managing global app state using tools like Redux Toolkit, Zustand, or the built-in Context API.",
      "contentMd": "### 💚 Free Resources\n---\n\n🟡 **Article** [React Context API Explained](https://www.freecodecamp.org/news/react-context-for-beginners/)\n🟡 **Article** [Redux Toolkit Quick Start](https://redux-toolkit.js.org/introduction/getting-started)\n🟣 **Video** [Redux Toolkit Tutorial](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bbkBuqC1rU4)"
    },
    {
      "nodeKey": "testing",
      "title": "Testing (Jest)",
      "coords": { "x": 1050, "y": 500 },
      "isRequired": false,
      "summary": "Ensuring your code works as expected using testing frameworks like Jest or Vitest and React Testing Library.",
      "contentMd": "### 💚 Free Resources\n---\n\n🟡 **Documentation** [Jest Getting Started](https://jestjs.io/docs/getting-started)\n🟡 **Article** [React Testing Library Tutorial](https://www.rwieruch.de/react-testing-library/)\n🟣 **Video** [React Testing Crash Course](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8Xwq35cPwYg)"
    },
    {
      "nodeKey": "auth_frontend",
      "title": "Auth Strategies",
      "coords": { "x": 1050, "y": 750 },
      "isRequired": false,
      "summary": "Implementing login/signup on the frontend using JWT, Cookies, or OAuth (e.g., Login with Google).",
      "contentMd": "### 💚 Free Resources\n---\n\n🟡 **Article** [Intro to JSON Web Tokens (JWT)](https://jwt.io/introduction)\n🟡 **Article** [Authentication vs Authorization](https://auth0.com/intro-to-iam/authentication-vs-authorization/)\n🟣 **Video** [React Authentication Crash Course](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=X3qDNOw1vi4)"
    },
    {
      "nodeKey": "ssr",
      "title": "SSR (Next.js)",
      "coords": { "x": 700, "y": 750 },
      "isRequired": false,
      "summary": "Server-Side Rendering framework for React. Essential for SEO, performance, and full-stack capabilities.",
      "contentMd": "### 💚 Free Resources\n---\n\n⚫ **Roadmap** [Next.js Roadmap](https://roadmap.sh/nextjs)\n🟡 **Course** [Next.js Learn (Official)](https://nextjs.org/learn)\n🟣 **Video** [Next.js 14 Full Course](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zjAqacIC_3c)"
    },
    {
      "nodeKey": "project_frontend",
      "title": "Frontend Capstone",
      "coords": { "x": 350, "y": 750 },
      "isRequired": true,
      "summary": "Build a complex dashboard, e-commerce UI, or SaaS application to prove your mastery of the frontend stack.",
      "contentMd": "### 💚 Project Ideas\n---\n\n🟡 **Platform** [Frontend Mentor (Real designs to code)](https://www.frontendmentor.io/)\n🟡 **Platform** [DevChallenges.io](https://devchallenges.io/)\n\n### 💡 Suggested Projects\n1.  **E-commerce Shop:** Cart, Filtering, Payment Integration.\n2.  **Kanban Board:** Drag and drop tasks (like Trello).\n3.  **Chat Application:** Real-time messaging UI."
    }
  ],
  "edges": [
    { "sourceKey": "internet", "targetKey": "html" },
    { "sourceKey": "html", "targetKey": "css" },
    { "sourceKey": "css", "targetKey": "js" },
    { "sourceKey": "js", "targetKey": "git" },
    { "sourceKey": "git", "targetKey": "npm" },
    { "sourceKey": "npm", "targetKey": "react" },
    { "sourceKey": "react", "targetKey": "tailwind" },
    { "sourceKey": "tailwind", "targetKey": "build_tools" },
    { "sourceKey": "build_tools", "targetKey": "api" },
    { "sourceKey": "api", "targetKey": "state" },
    { "sourceKey": "state", "targetKey": "testing" },
    { "sourceKey": "testing", "targetKey": "auth_frontend" },
    { "sourceKey": "auth_frontend", "targetKey": "ssr" },
    { "sourceKey": "ssr", "targetKey": "project_frontend" }
  ]
}

{
  "cvUrl": "https://gupjob-storage.s3.amazonaws.com/cv/banhkheo-resume.pdf",
  "linkedinUrl": "https://linkedin.com/in/your-profile",
  "industry": "Software Engineering",
  "skills": ["TypeScript", "NestJS", "Microservices", "PostgreSQL"],
  "bio": "## Senior Backend Developer\nPassionate about building scalable microservices and helping students navigate their tech careers."
}
